title: yet another lightsabers
description: Resource pack which allows you to change any sword to lightsaber - now in 16 colors.
body:
## What is this?
This resource pack allows you to change any sword to lightsaber - now in 16 colors. 

## How to install
Download and put in minecraft/resourcepacks folder. Then remember to select it in game.

## How to use
### Option 1:
Simply rename any sword on the anvil. The names that work:
- white lightsaber
- light gray lightsaber
- gray lightsaber
- black lightsaber
- brown lightsaber
- red lightsaber
- orange lightsaber
- yellow lightsaber
- lime lightsaber
- green lightsaber
- cyan lightsaber
- light blue lightsaber
- blue lightsaber
- purple lightsaber
- magenta lightsaber
- pink lightsaber

There has to be space between color and lightsaber. In general, colors are the same as in vanilla colored blocks, for example glass.

This option **works only on swords.**

### Option 2:
You can also access models by /give command. This way you can put this model on ANY minecraft item.

Example:

/give @s minecraft:wooden_sword[minecraft:item_model="minecraft:red_lightsaber"]

You can use any other item instead of wooden sword. To get other colors, simply change the color in the name (colors like above).

### Option 3:
It is possible to use it with other data packs, for example ModelApplier. If you want to do it this way for some reason, then names must have underscore instead of space, for example:
- red_lightsaber
- green_lightsaber
- light_blue_lightsaber

This way you also can put it on any item, not only swords. Works for all colors listed above.

## Good to know
It is my first published resource pack :D 

I added all the colors, since they use vanilla glass texture anyway. Some of the colors may not be the prettiest, but maybe you would like it :)
